description: backend: fix cli_tests port-detection to compile and pass on Windows
context: backend/tests/cli_tests.rs uses lsof/ss unconditionally; both are absent on Windows, causing NotFound panic in rust-windows CI. Replace the port-detection block with cfg-gated branches: #[cfg(unix)] keeps lsof+ss chain; #[cfg(windows)] uses netstat -ano filtered by child.id() PID to extract the listening port. No logic changes outside port-detection. cargo test -p anvilml --features mock-hardware --test cli_tests exits 0 on Windows.
